text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking about the<n>academy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Out of my waaaay!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Phew! Thank goodness I didn't crash<n>into you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry to startle you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My fortune this morning said I'd<n>have good luck
if I gave my all to<n>everything I did today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm using my lucky dash<n>to get
around, and why I ate my lucky<n>lunch during
class!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And when I got caught, I pulled out<n>my lucky
groveling to ask for<n>forgiveness!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This overwhelming feeling of elation<n>must be the
sensation of my body<n>getting filled with good
fortune!
choice_data_list: It's probably just from you rushing everything...

Why don't you try being a little more 
enthusiastic?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk! I swear I'm not being impatient!<n>It's more
than that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm not, but... Nnngh... Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You're right. I'll try to take things<n>more seriously.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll start by holding this pen with so<n>much force
that it begins shaking...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...and activate every granule of my<n>fortune-telling
wisdom in order to fill<n>my upcoming quiz with
runes!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her drive to give a hundred percent in<n>everything
is great, but I get the<n>feeling that she has extra
classes on<n>the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's this?! Are you're saying<n>I'm still not
applying myself<n>enthusiastically enough?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then I'll warm myself up with<n>some crazy
mystical posing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to start doing it while I head<n>on over to
the training track.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Lemon peel, orange wheel,<n>upside-down purple
seal... One, two,<n>threeee!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Gah! What the heck is she doing?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Before long, the Colorful Seal<n>Warm-Up Routine
becomes an<n>underground hit among the<n>
Umamusume.
